title: Notification No.34/2006-Cus(NT), dated 27.3.2006
text: Notification No. 34 / 2006- Customs (N.T.) 27th March 2006 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Joint Commissioner of Customs (Imports), Air Cargo Complex, Mumbai to act as, - (i) Joint Commissioner of Customs (Imports), New Customs House, Ballard Estate, Mumbai; (ii) Assistant Commissioner of Customs (Imports- Appraising Group VB) , Ballard Estate, Mumbai; (iii) Assistant Commissioner of Customs (Imports- Appraising Group VB) , Air Cargo Complex, Mumbai; and (iv) Appraiser (Group VB), Jawahar Customs House for the purposes of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Picks Medical Systems Limited and others, issued, vide, F.No. DGCEI/MZU/I & IS 'C'/12(4)56/2004/Pt.II dated the 6th June, 2005 by the Additional Director, Directorate General of Central Excise Intelligence, Mumbai Zonal Unit, III Floor, N.T.C. House, 15, N.M. Marg, Ballard Estate, Mumbai- 400001. F.NO.437/ 13/ 2006-CUS.IV -- 1 of 1 --
